title: Alexander Polyakov (physicist)
body: Alexander Markovich Polyakov (Russian: Алекса́ндр Ма́ркович Поляко́в; born 27 September 1945) is a Russian theoretical physicist, formerly at the Landau Institute in Moscow and, since 1989, at Princeton University, where he is the Joseph Henry Professor of Physics Emeritus.
categories: Academic staff of the Moscow Institute of Physics and Technology
Corresponding Members of the Russian Academy of Sciences
Corresponding Members of the USSR Academy of Sciences
